label: shallow_depth
summary: Shallow depth means the movement did not reach the expected bottom position often enough to support full-range reps.
common_misreads: camera angle can affect perceived depth
coaching_cues: Slow down the descent and pause briefly at the bottom to make depth easier to repeat.

label: hip_sag
summary: Hip sag indicates the trunk line dropped below the surrounding body line during the marked interval.
common_misreads: short single-frame dips should not be overcalled
coaching_cues: Reduce speed slightly so you can keep the trunk line steadier through the middle of the rep.

label: incomplete_lockout
summary: Incomplete lockout means the top position did not consistently reach the expected overhead or pressing finish.
common_misreads: small camera-angle shifts can hide the final top position
coaching_cues: Finish each rep fully before starting the next one.
Use a slightly slower top phase to make the lockout more repeatable.
